YouSquared · B2C2B ICP Analysis · March 2026

Who gets value from YouSquared?

Mostly bosses & sellers that help build, sell & service properties

Healthcare 🏥 also runs on phone calls, just not on mobile

Pharmacies without call centers experience "phone call hell", but it's on desk phones

Most healthcare professionals aren't missing patient calls on a personal mobile — patient calls route through central or front desk phone lines running on secure UCaaS phone systems like RingCentral & Verizon OneTalk. The opportunity is real, but involves a web app product embedded in UCaaS — not a personal iOS app.

⚠️ High Need, yet Poor Fit — Today

Pharmacists / Outpatient Nurses

Multi-provider clinics · Hospital systems · Group practices

Value rate on iOS~5%
Why they loseCalls go to front desk, not mobile 🖥
Future GTMUCaaS embed — Verizon OneTalk 🔮

It's the Bosses & Sellers that get value

Including Contractors & Agents

It's the phone call leads that generate value

Only 17% of users get real value, with YouSquared handling phone call leads

We handle five types of calls — only lead calls generate measurable business value.

More examples:
• Prospect wants an estimate for cleanup and bi-weekly yard maintenance on a foreclosed lot
• Customer — 1-day scissor lift rental, $550
• Contractor needs a fence repair estimate at a property in Savannah, TN
• Homeowner — basement wall repair estimate
• Prospect — two commercial truck insurance issues, needs legal help
⭐ Lead Pet cremation service — caller wants to schedule an appointment. Wants a callback ASAP. 3%
More examples:
• Customer following up on shower leak reported a week ago — only happens when running, available anytime
• Subcontractor — did the homeowners decide to move forward with crawl space insulation?
• Caregiver's daughter hospitalized, stop Ozempic order
• Vendor — overdue invoice follow-up
• Tenant can't pay rent online, needs help
🔄 Callback Pharmacy — patient called about semaglutide insurance coverage. 8%
More examples:
• Cousin called just to check in on you and see how you're doing
• Wife called — wants you to call her back tonight, any time is fine
• Friend calling for advice about his granddaughter's car, trouble starting
• Son called — kid is doing well, get the mail
• Spouse has a doctor appointment at 2pm
👤 Personal School board automated call — student absence notification. 3%
More examples:
• Yelp rep wants to discuss a full service page for your business
• Lender — your company may qualify for a $250K line of credit
• Lead gen company — exclusive homeowner leads, wants to reschedule appointment
• Security vendor — free touchscreen wireless system, no install fees
• Zillow rep showcasing your listing performance
📣 Solicitation Robocall about "newly released funds." 10%
More examples:
• Caller said user's name twice but left no message
• Wrong number — stranger trying to reach someone else
• Voicemail only contains: "may cause negative effects"
• Caller expressed annoyance, no info provided
• Wrong number — caller looking for a retail store
📵 Hang-up / silent Caller disconnects before speaking. 76%

For 83% of users that don't get phone call leads, our value is not markedly different than iOS Call Screening.

Value is exceptional whenever phone call leads typically "call the next place" if the first place doesn't answer; YouSquared transforms them into waiting 30 mins for a callback. That's when YouSquared can enable 5–6 figures in additional income per user!

The common thread 🧵

YouSquared wins when the user (a) receives genuine business inquiries by phone 📞, (b) can't answer every call due to their work pattern 🏃, and (c) doesn't have a dedicated receptionist or call center handling overflow 🚫🖥.

The AI fills the gap between "call comes in" and "human calls back" — and that gap is worth $60K to $20M per year 💰.

The strongest signal: people who build, sell, and service buildings.

From the general contractor pouring foundations to the realtor selling the finished home to the landscaper maintaining the property — this ecosystem accounts for over half of our high-value users and over three-quarters of the dollar value YouSquared captures.

YouSquared · B2C2B ICP Analysis · March 2026 · Based on 437 active users, 110 with ≥$10K annualized value
